report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering solver networks & order flow auctions (CoW Protocol, UniswapX, 1inch Fusion) and the Aptos blockchain ecosystem (Move language, DeFi protocols, RWAs), filling high-priority content gaps.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Solver Networks & OFAs: CoW Protocol processed $87B in 2025 trading volume (2x from $40.2B in 2024), holds 34% DEX aggregator market share. UniswapX uses Dutch auctions with 90%+ volume filled by 2 market makers (SCP, Wintermute). 1inch Fusion uses decreasing-price Dutch auctions with partial fills. Solver-based DEXes enhance execution welfare and protect from MEV (sandwich attacks, frontrunning). CoWSwap has the most decentralized solver set.

Aptos Blockchain 2026: $1B+ TVL milestone, $1.15B in on-chain stablecoins, approaching 10M daily transactions at $0.00007 average cost. RWAs on Aptos surpassed $540M (top 3 blockchain for RWAs) with BlackRock BUIDL and Franklin Templeton BENJI. Top DeFi: Thala Labs (30%+ spot volume, $2.9B ThalaSwap V2 Q2 2025), Aries Markets (lending + 10x leverage), Amnis Finance (liquid staking, 7-10% APY). 25% rise in VC investments. Aave V3 launched on Aptos in 2025.

Gap analysis: Solver networks/OFAs were completely absent from degen0x's 242+ learn guides despite being a top DeFi infrastructure trend. Aptos was missing as a dedicated guide despite being a major L1 with $1B+ TVL.

sections.title: Content Created
items: Solver Networks & Order Flow Auctions Guide 2026 (~3200 words, 14 min read): Covers CoW Protocol batch auctions, UniswapX fillers, 1inch Fusion resolvers. 8 sections including protocol comparison table, step-by-step OFA workflow, CoW deep dive, UniswapX vs 1inch Fusion comparison, MEV protection analysis, risks. 6 FAQs.

Aptos Blockchain Guide 2026 (~3200 words, 14 min read): Covers Move programming language, key metrics, top DeFi protocols (Thala, Aries, Amnis, Liquidswap, PancakeSwap), RWA growth ($540M+), Aptos vs Sui comparison, getting started guide, risks. 6 FAQs.

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Solver Networks Guide: Title 'Solver Networks & Order Flow Auctions Guide 2026: CoW Protocol, UniswapX & 1inch Fusion | degen0x'. Target keywords: solver networks, order flow auctions, CoW Protocol, UniswapX, 1inch Fusion, MEV protection. Article + FAQ schemas. 12 keywords in metadata.

Aptos Guide: Title 'Aptos Blockchain Guide 2026: Move Language, DeFi Ecosystem & RWAs | degen0x'. Target keywords: Aptos blockchain, APT token, Move language, Aptos DeFi, Thala Labs, Aptos RWA. Article + FAQ schemas. 12 keywords in metadata.

Both pages: layout.tsx with Metadata export (title, description, keywords, openGraph article type with publishedTime, twitter card). StructuredData component with Article + FAQ JSON-LD in page.tsx. Breadcrumb navigation. Internal links to 6 related pages each.
Both slugs added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
